steps.title: Find the mode
steps.content:
The mode is the age with the highest frequency. Age $18$ appears $6$ times, more than any other age, so
$$\text{mode}=18$$

steps.title: Find the median
steps.content:
There are $20$ students, so the median is the average of the $10$th and $11$th values. Positions $7$ through $11$ are age $19$, so
$$\text{median}=19$$

steps.title: Order the measures
steps.content: $$18<19<20$$ So the order is $$\text{mode}<\text{median}<\text{mean}$$ The answer is A.
